message:
fix(writing): align FAQ platform claim with setup section (drop Linux)

Setup section specifies Claude Code Desktop is "(Mac or Windows)"; FAQ
said "Mac, Windows, and Linux". Claude Code Desktop does not ship a
Linux build — the FAQ overpromised. Reconciled the FAQ answer to "Mac
or Windows" to match the setup section and factual reality.

bun tsc --noEmit clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1375,9 +1375,8 @@ export function WillsEstateArticle() { Does it work on my phone?

- Not today. Claude Code Desktop and Codex Desktop are Mac, - Windows, and Linux. There is no mobile app. You need a - computer. + Not today. Claude Code Desktop and Codex Desktop run on Mac + or Windows. There is no mobile app. You need a computer.
